name: Weighted Orbs
flavor: Palm-sized iron spheres kept endlessly aloft. A Firebrand sets them alight, but even cold they land like a dropped anvil.

parryProfile.note: An orb still in hand can knock a blow aside, though its round face is a clumsier guard than a club. Once thrown it is gone. How many orbs a Juggler still holds is governed by the Juggler's engine (Deflect).
